summary.sosovalue: Over the past day, SoSoValue has been prominently featured in community discussions and promotions, with users sharing referral links for earning EXP points toward a potential $SOSO airdrop, highlighting its comprehensive crypto research tools including K-line charts, news, reports, team info, and tokenomics all in one place. Multiple posts reference SoSoValue data on ETF inflows, such as spot BTC ETFs recording three consecutive days of positive flows ($254M net), ETH ETFs at $6.57M, and various altcoin ETFs like XRP, SOL, HBAR showing strong weekly performance without outflows. Japanese community account @SosovalueJP responded to user queries on EXP airdrop mechanics, confirming post-120% achievement users can unstake MAG7 after a 14-day cooldown. No major official announcements from excluded main accounts, but ecosystem activity emphasizes daily tasks and analytics utility amid market rotations.
summary.sodex: SoDEX, the high-performance order-book DEX on ValueChain L1 by SoSoValue, announced and completed a mainnet upgrade on Feb 27 (08:00-09:00 UTC) to improve performance, pausing services briefly with confirmation of restored deposits, withdrawals, and trading, assuring fund security. Key highlights include listing on CoinGecko for spot and futures with full verification, launch of 9 stock perpetuals (PLTR, CRCL, HOOD, COIN, AMD, INTC, MSTR, SNDK, MU up to 10x leverage) each with analyst theses and targets, and Week 3 tiered fee reductions maintaining zero maker fees for spot/perps to encourage volume. Community engagement shows users farming SoPoints for rewards, with top rankings and promotions tying into broader $SOSO incentives.
summary.ssi: SSI Index, likely referring to SoSoValue's crypto indexes like SSI MAG7 (noted at $13.42 with -0.60% change amid 650 downs vs 655 ups suggesting rebound potential), saw limited direct mentions but is contextualized in market updates from SoSoValue data shared across posts, tracking sectors like DeFAI (+9.89% to +19.18%), PerpDEX (+2.31%), and ETF candidates (-2.01%). No specific announcements from regional accounts or major posts on SSI updates, but integrated into daily crypto spotlights and analytics, with users referencing verified indexes at sosovalue.com/assets/cryptoindex/verified-index. Overall, activity focuses on broader SoSoValue ecosystem metrics rather than isolated SSI developments.
